title: hymenocallis bistubata
intro: Hymenocallis bistubata, also known as the Yellow Trumpet Lily or Wild Swamp Lily, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Amaryllidaceae. It is native to the southeastern United States and is known for its beautiful, nodding, yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Hymenocallis bistubata can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties.
